Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x720C "THEARCOFYESOD-720C" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Arc of Yesod, The.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The following modifications were made: 1. Patched the JSR $BD71 instruction at $8A7E to be JSR $7800 instead. 2. Added a small routine at $7800 to set $3A to $C1 so that the game defaults to joystick. The routine then jumps to $BD71 to carry on the normal code flow. 3. Patched the JSR $8B14 instruction at $8A81 to be JSR $7900 instead. 4. Added a small routine at $7900 to check the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then it sets $3A to $03 and returns, causing the game to start. If not pressed, the routine then jumps to $8B14 to carry on the normal code flow.
